pass_if_all_true: Officio role/settings intake ACK exists or missing-authority WARN/BLOCK exists before implementation.
Taskpack is not treated as role authority.
All changes remain inside allowed IMPERIUM_NEW_GENERATION write paths.
All 10 organ node visual unit passports exist.
All 10 right context panel passports exist.
Custodes and Throne units are locked and not real.
Visual address registry references required units.
Backend/frontend truth map references required units and does not invent readiness.
Commit is created if gates pass.
warn_conditions: Officio source missing/incomplete but explicit missing-authority WARN exists and Owner correction allows continuation.
Some backend sources remain UNKNOWN but are documented with reasons.
Some organ profiles remain stub-only because implementation does not exist yet.
Validator catches structure/semantics but not full future UI correctness.
Push fails due to credentials/network, but commit and evidence exist.
block_conditions: Taskpack is used as role authority.
Work spills outside allowed write scope.
Any locked Custodes/Throne unit is marked real.
Organ nodes or right panels are missing.
Task produces visual concepts or CSS polish instead of topology hardening.
